Added context about what responses contain and typical use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createResponse' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks essential details about what data is required, what the operation returns, and its effects. Added clarity about expected inputs (survey ID, answers), return value (response object with ID and timestamp), and side effects (response becomes available for retrieval) to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Creates a response in the database.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new response record in the database for a survey submission. Accepts response data including survey ID, answers, and respondent information. Returns the created response object with a unique response ID and timestamp. The response is immediately available for retrieval and analysis.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks essential details about what data is required, what the operation returns, and its effects. Added clarity about expected inputs (survey ID, answers), return value (response object with ID and timestamp), and side effects (response becomes available for retrieval) to improve AI agent interpretability.
